history.qwen_observation: Compilation failed in SpringFoxConfig.java due to an incompatible Info constructor after the Spring Boot 2.7 upgrade, caused by swagger-models being bumped to a version that removed the 8-argument constructor.
history.qwen_rationale: Pinning swagger-models to 2.1.12 via a POM_PATCH step before the Spring Boot 2.7 upgrade restores the constructor signature expected by the existing SpringFox configuration, allowing the build to succeed under JDK 8 before proceeding to Java 11/17/21 and the Spring Boot 3.3 migration.

history.qwen_observation: Build failed at upgrade_spring_boot_2_7 because swagger-models was upgraded to 2.2.x by the Spring Boot 2.7 BOM, which removed the multi-argument Info constructor used by the project's SpringFoxConfig.
history.qwen_rationale: Pinning swagger-models, swagger-annotations, and swagger-core to 2.1.2 restores the expected constructor signature before the SB 2.7 upgrade. SpringFox is incompatible with Spring Boot 3.x (javax vs jakarta), so it is removed via RemoveDependency before the SB 3.3 migration to prevent namespace conflicts and compile failures downstream.

history.qwen_observation: Compilation failed at upgrade_spring_boot_2_7 because SpringFoxConfig.java uses a deprecated Info constructor incompatible with OpenAPI 3.x dependencies pulled in during the Spring Boot 2.7 upgrade.
history.qwen_rationale: SpringFox is EOL and fundamentally incompatible with Spring Boot 2.6+. Removing the SpringFox dependencies and its configuration file before upgrading Spring Boot eliminates the API mismatch. This allows the Spring Boot 2.7 and 3.3 upgrades to proceed cleanly, followed by the standard JDK 11/17/21 migration steps.

history.qwen_observation: Recipe validation failed because org.openrewrite.java.DeleteSourceFile is not in the allowed recipe primitives list.
history.qwen_rationale: Removed the unsupported DeleteSourceFile recipe from the remove_springfox step, keeping only RemoveDependency recipes. This bypasses the validation error and allows the Spring Boot 2.7 upgrade to proceed without SpringFox dependencies on the classpath.

history.qwen_observation: SpringFox dependencies were removed but source files still referenced them, causing compilation failure at the Spring Boot 2.7 upgrade step.
history.qwen_rationale: Replacing the manual dependency removal with the SpringFoxToSpringDoc meta-recipe will automatically migrate all SpringFox annotations, configurations, and imports to SpringDoc, ensuring the project compiles cleanly before and during the Spring Boot 2.7 and 3.3 upgrades.
